text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, some time after Director Akikawa took
off for America...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello. I was hoping to explain the details of the
Unity Cup to you, if you're free.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
First, allow me to briefly explain what the Unity
Cup is.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
As Director Akikawa mentioned the other day, it's
a team-based competition held within the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It consists of a series of matches held biannually
in late June and December. The first match will be
in December of this year.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In each match, teams compete in five categories
of races—sprint, mile, medium, long, and
dirt—and must win three of them to claim victory.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Initially, preseason matches will be held, and
teams will be assigned rankings based on the
results.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Once all preseason matches have finished, it's
time for the finals! The outcome of this match will
determine the Unity Cup's overall winner.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
For now, you should focus on doing well in the
preseason matches so you can tackle the finals in
the most advantageous position!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Before that, though, you'll need to assemble a
team.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I recommend you try reaching out to Umamusume
who have previously supported you in your
training!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can continue to recruit members all
throughout the preseason period, so there's no
need to feel rushed.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And if your team does well in the preseason matches, athletes might even begin approaching you to join!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Do your best to create a wonderful team and
show us what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and there's one last important thing you
should know.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
When you register for the Unity Cup, you'll need
to choose a team name.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's just for use in this academy competition, so it
won't be relevant to your trainee's career in the
Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But a good name can help boost your team's
morale, so try to consider it carefully!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's all from me today. I'll be cheering you on
from the sidelines.
